1500: Approaching Charles Street Dock, speeds and courses. At this point the Commanding Officr relieved the Officer of the deck. 1501 Small rowboat anchored dead ahead. Put wheel hard right, engines full speed astern. 3:01:30 stopped motors to keep from fouling screw on boat's anchor line. 3:01:45 Rammed end of Charles Street Dock at approximately one half (1/2) mile per hour. No apparent damage to vessel, and very little to dock, which is practically falling apart from neglect. 3:08 Moored to dock.
